title: AgentConfig
description: Configuration schema for the Safe Agent. Edit agent.config.json to adapt to any problem statement.

domain.description: Human-readable label for the agent's domain (e.g. cybersecurity, data-analysis, code-review). No logic depends on this.

agentName.description: Display name for the agent. Used in logs and UI.

agentId.description: Identifier passed to ArmorClaw for policy tracking. Must match ArmorIQ config.

systemPrompt.description: The ONLY field that defines what the agent does. Change this on 23rd to match the problem statement. The ArmorClaw safety layer wraps this prompt automatically.

activeTools.description: Which tools from the registry to expose. ArmorClaw plans ONLY over these tools. All other tools are inaccessible.

policyTemplate.description: Which policy template from /policies/templates/ to activate at startup.
